title: Time type not formatted correctly in SSPS mode
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE time_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, typetime TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT t.id, t.typetime, r.ref_time FROM time_test t LEFT JOIN time_ref r ON t.typetime = r.ref_time WHERE t.typetime IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect time formatting with 3-digit hour in SSPS mode
